subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Lord of the Kingdom! In this moment, when the heart of this yearning soul is ablaze with the fire of the love of God, I am occupied with thoughts of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده رب ملکوت در ایندم که قلب این مشتاق مشتعل بنار محبت الله است بخیال تو
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @love of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
